questionHtml: Outline how changes in temperature over short time periods could give a misleading impression of changes to the Earth’s climate.
markschemeHtml:
short-term reading could show global temperatures falling while the trend is rising
OR
fluctuations from year to year may not show long-term trend;

meta.title: Outline how changes in temperature over short time periods could give a misleading impression of changes to the Earth’s climate.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.3.1. Anthropogenic causes of climate change
